query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(DISTINCT YEAR(dteNewListing)) as years FROM properfyProperties WHERE companyId = 'company_1766331506068' AND dteNewListing IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(dteNewListing) = 2026;
